title: trixis ophiorhiza subsp. glandulifera
intro: Trixis ophiorhiza subsp. glandulifera, also known as trixis glandulifera, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of trixis glandulifera include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Trixis glandulifera can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and reduce inflammation.
